old_value: {"id":"GoPromptAddOn-860","title":"Set up Python project structure with config.json","description":"Create companion/ directory, claude_monitor.py entry point, config.json with sensible Windows defaults (wow_path, account_name, poll_interval, cpu_threshold, idle_grace_seconds), and requirements.txt. Config should default wow_path to C:/Program Files (x86)/World of Warcraft/_anniversary_ and document that account_name needs updating.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:44:50Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:44:50Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-9b0","title":"Implement process detection for Claude Code using psutil","description":"Use psutil to find Claude Code processes. Claude runs as a Node.js process (CLI named 'claude'). Detect presence/absence of the process. Return 'closed' status if not found. Keep platform-specific logic behind clean abstractions for later Linux support.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:44:56Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:44:56Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-pg6","title":"Implement CPU-based idle vs working heuristic","description":"Monitor Claude process and child processes CPU usage. If above threshold (~2-5%) sustained over sample window, status is 'working'. If near-zero for several seconds, status is 'idle'. This is the core logic — must be well-tested. Write real unit tests for the heuristic including edge cases (spike then drop, gradual decline, multiple child processes).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:02Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:02Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-9hp","title":"Implement SavedVariables file writer","description":"Write ClaudeGuardDB to WoW addon SavedVariables path: \u003cwow_path\u003e/WTF/Account/\u003caccount\u003e/SavedVariables/ClaudeGuard.lua. Write atomically (temp file + rename) to prevent WoW reading partial files. Format: ClaudeGuardDB = { [\"status\"] = \"idle\", [\"lastUpdate\"] = \u003cepoch\u003e }","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:07Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:07Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-0od","title":"Implement state transition detection and grace period logic","description":"Track state transitions (working-\u003eidle, idle-\u003eworking, closed). Apply idle_grace_seconds before flipping to idle to prevent flickering. Only trigger writes/actions on actual state changes. Grace period means Claude must be idle for N continuous seconds before status becomes 'idle'.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:14Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:14Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-scj","title":"Add logging to companion script","description":"Add structured logging with configurable verbosity. Log state transitions, process detection results, file writes. Use Python's logging module. Include timestamps and log levels.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:19Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:19Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-b1t","title":"Integration test companion script on Windows","description":"End-to-end test: run companion script with Claude Code open, verify it detects the process, correctly identifies idle vs working states, and writes valid SavedVariables file. Verify config.json defaults work on Windows.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:23Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:23Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-cmh","title":"Create addon file structure and .toc","description":"Create addon/ClaudeGuard/ directory with ClaudeGuard.toc (Interface: 20504 for TBC), ClaudeGuard.lua, Blocker.lua, Notification.lua, PlayerState.lua, and Textures/ placeholder. TOC should declare SavedVariables: ClaudeGuardDB.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:29Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:29Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-cmn","title":"Implement PlayerState.lua - combat, instance, PvP detection","description":"Detect if player is in a protected context: in combat (UnitAffectingCombat), in dungeon/raid (IsInInstance party/raid), in BG/arena (pvp/arena). Expose ClaudeGuard.PlayerState.IsProtected(). Register events: PLAYER_REGEN_DISABLED, PLAYER_REGEN_ENABLED, ZONE_CHANGED_NEW_AREA, UPDATE_BATTLEFIELD_STATUS.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:35Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:35Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-a7z","title":"Implement Blocker.lua - full-screen overlay with input capture","description":"Full-screen frame at TOOLTIP strata that captures all mouse and keyboard input. Display message: 'Claude Code is waiting for a prompt. Get back to work\\!' EnableMouse(true), EnableKeyboard(true), SetPropagateKeyboardInput(false). Include snooze button (2 min, max 3 uses per session).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:41Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:41Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-vvr","title":"Implement Notification.lua - non-blocking notification display","description":"Small icon + text anchored to top-center. Pulses/glows gently. Text: 'Claude is ready for a prompt'. Play subtle built-in WoW sound on first appearance. Auto-transitions to Blocker when player leaves protected state.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:46Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:46Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-rky","title":"Implement ClaudeGuard.lua core controller","description":"Main controller: register ADDON_LOADED, read ClaudeGuardDB on load, start polling ticker. On load: check status, check PlayerState, show Blocker or Notification as appropriate. Add slash commands: /cg status, /cg snooze, /cg disable, /cg config.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:51Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:51Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-8em","title":"Test addon with manually edited SavedVariables","description":"Test the addon by manually writing different ClaudeGuardDB values (status=idle, status=working, status=closed) and verifying correct behavior: blocker shows for idle/closed, hides for working, notification shows in protected contexts.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:56Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:56Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-h3a","title":"Windows keystroke sender for WoW reload","description":"Implement a WindowsKeystrokeSender that finds the WoW window by title using win32gui, brings it to focus, and sends Escape -\u003e Enter -\u003e /reload -\u003e Enter. Use ctypes SendInput or pyautogui. Must handle: WoW not running (skip), chat box open (Escape clears it). Abstract behind a platform interface (KeystrokeSender ABC) for later Linux support.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T15:17:00Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T15:17:00Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-ryw","title":"Linux keystroke sender for WoW reload","description":"Implement LinuxKeystrokeSender using xdotool. Find WoW window with 'xdotool search --name World of Warcraft', send Escape+Enter+/reload+Enter via xdotool type/key. Implements the same KeystrokeSender ABC as Windows.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T15:17:05Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T15:17:05Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-o9f","title":"Integrate reload trigger into monitor loop with delay","description":"Wire the keystroke sender into the monitor loop. On working-\u003eidle: write SavedVariables, then wait reload_delay_seconds (default 10) before sending reload. On idle-\u003eworking: write SavedVariables and send reload immediately. Add reload_delay_seconds to config.json. The delay prevents disrupting combat that started after Claude went idle.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T15:17:11Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T15:17:11Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-0ay","title":"Handle edge cases: WoW not running, Claude restart, multiple windows","description":"Edge cases to handle: (1) WoW not running on transition - just write SavedVariables, skip reload. (2) Claude restarted mid-session - transitions through closed-\u003eworking naturally. (3) Multiple WoW windows - target first found, log a warning. (4) Player on loading screen - WoW handles gracefully (verify). (5) Companion crash/restart - re-detects current state from scratch, no stale assumptions.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T15:17:18Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T15:17:18Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-emg","title":"Full integration test: companion + addon end-to-end","description":"Manual test: (1) Start companion and WoW with addon. (2) Open Claude, give prompt - verify unblocked. (3) Let Claude finish - verify block after delay. (4) Give Claude another prompt - verify unblock. (5) Let Claude finish, enter combat before delay - verify notification not blocker after reload fires.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T15:17:27Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T15:17:27Z"}
